options.h(3) Library Functions Manual options.h(3)

NAME

options.h - OPTIONS section generator for man pages.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * manpage_content_generate_options (const options_config_t *config)
Generate OPTIONS section content. void manpage_content_free_options (char *content)
Free generated options content.

Detailed Description

OPTIONS section generator for man pages.

Generates the OPTIONS section from option descriptors in the config.

Definition in file include/ascii-chat/options/manpage/content/options.h.

Function Documentation

void manpage_content_free_options (char * content)

Free generated options content.

Parameters

content Content to free (can be NULL)

Definition at line 202 of file lib/options/manpage/content/options.c.

202                                                  {
203   if (content) {
204     SAFE_FREE(content);
205   }
206 }




References SAFE_FREE.


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().






char
  * manpage_content_generate_options (const options_config_t *
  config)


Generate OPTIONS section content. Creates formatted OPTIONS
    section from option descriptors, grouped by category with proper groff
    formatting.




Parameters


Config Module Options
  configuration with descriptors


Returns


Newly allocated content string (caller must free)


Definition at line 17 of file
    lib/options/manpage/content/options.c.


17                                                                        {
18   if (!config) {
19     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(1, char *);
20     buffer[0] = '\0';
21     return buffer;
22   }
23 
24   if (config->num_descriptors == 0) {
25     // Generate fallback content when no options are defined
26     size_t buffer_capacity = 512;
27     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
28     size_t offset = 0;
29     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\nNo command-line options are available for this mode.\n");
30     log_debug("Generated OPTIONS section (fallback - no options found)");
31     return buffer;
32   }
33 
34   // Use a growing buffer for dynamic content
35   size_t buffer_capacity = 8192;
36   char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
37   size_t offset = 0;
38 
39   // Add introductory paragraph explaining mode flags, defaults, and env vars
40   offset +=
41       safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "Each option shows which modes it applies to with\n");
42   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B (modes: ...)\n");
43   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "notation. Default values are shown with\n");
44   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B (default: ...).\n");
45   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "See the\n");
46   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B ENVIRONMENT\n");
47   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "section for environment variable equivalents.\n");
48   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\n");
49   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "Configuration precedence (lowest to highest):\n");
50   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B config.toml\n");
51   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "(see\n");
52   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".BR ascii-chat (5))\n");
53   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "< environment variables <\n");
54   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B command-line flags.\n");
55   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "Later values override earlier ones.\n");
56   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\n");
57   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "Options marked\n");
58   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B global\n");
59   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset,
60                           "must be passed before any mode and apply to all modes.\n");
61   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset,
62                           "Mode-specific options are passed after the mode name.\n");
63   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\n");
64   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "The default mode (running\n");
65   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B ascii-chat\n");
66   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset,
67                           "with no mode) accepts both global and default mode options with no mode specified.\n");
68   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\n");
69 
70   // Build list of unique groups in order of first appearance
71   const char **unique_groups = SAFE_MALLOC(config->num_descriptors * sizeof(const char *), const char **);
72   size_t num_unique_groups = 0;
73 
74   for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_descriptors; i++) {
75     const option_descriptor_t *desc = &config->descriptors[i];
76 
77     // Skip hidden options
78     if (desc->hide_from_mode_help || desc->hide_from_binary_help || !desc->group) {
79       continue;
80     }
81 
82     // Check if this group is already in the list
83     bool group_exists = false;
84     for (size_t j = 0; j < num_unique_groups; j++) {
85       if (unique_groups[j] && strcmp(unique_groups[j], desc->group) == 0) {
86         group_exists = true;
87         break;
88       }
89     }
90 
91     // Add new group to list
92     if (!group_exists && num_unique_groups < config->num_descriptors) {
93       unique_groups[num_unique_groups++] = desc->group;
94     }
95   }
96 
97   // Print options grouped by category
98   for (size_t g = 0; g < num_unique_groups; g++) {
99     const char *current_group = unique_groups[g];
100 
101     // Add section heading for each group
102     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".SS %s\n", current_group);
103 
104     // Print all options in this group
105     for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_descriptors; i++) {
106       const option_descriptor_t *desc = &config->descriptors[i];
107 
108       // Skip if not in current group or if hidden
109       bool is_binary_option = (desc->mode_bitmask & OPTION_MODE_BINARY) != 0;
110       bool applies_to_mode = false;
111       if (is_binary_option) {
112         applies_to_mode = !desc->hide_from_binary_help;
113       } else {
114         applies_to_mode = !desc->hide_from_mode_help;
115       }
116       if (!applies_to_mode || !desc->group || strcmp(desc->group, current_group) != 0) {
117         continue;
118       }
119 
120       // Ensure buffer is large enough
121       if (offset + 512 >= buffer_capacity) {
122         buffer_capacity *= 2;
123         buffer = SAFE_REALLOC(buffer, buffer_capacity, char *);
124       }
125 
126       // Start option item
127       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".TP\n");
128 
129       // Write option flags
130       if (desc->short_name && desc->short_name != '\0') {
131         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B \\-%c, \\-\\-%s", desc->short_name,
132                                 desc->long_name);
133       } else {
134         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B \\-\\-%s", desc->long_name);
135       }
136 
137       // Add argument placeholder for value-taking options
138       if (desc->type != OPTION_TYPE_ACTION) {
139         // Check for custom placeholder first, fall back to type-based placeholder
140         const char *placeholder =
141             desc->arg_placeholder ? desc->arg_placeholder : options_get_type_placeholder(desc->type);
142         if (placeholder && *placeholder) {
143           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " \\fI%s\\fR", placeholder);
144         }
145       }
146 
147       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
148 
149       // Write help text
150       if (desc->help_text) {
151         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s", escape_groff_special(desc->help_text));
152         if (!desc->default_value) {
153           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
154         } else {
155           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " ");
156         }
157       } else if (desc->default_value) {
158         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " ");
159       }
160 
161       // Add default value if present
162       if (desc->default_value) {
163         char default_buf[256];
164         memset(default_buf, 0, sizeof(default_buf)); // Initialize buffer to prevent garbage
165         int n = options_format_default_value(desc->type, desc->default_value, default_buf, sizeof(default_buf));
166         // Skip empty strings (like --grep's default of "")
167         if (n > 0 && default_buf[0] != '\0') {
168           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "(default: ");
169           if (desc->type == OPTION_TYPE_STRING) {
170             offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s", escape_groff_special(default_buf));
171           } else {
172             offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s", default_buf);
173           }
174           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ")\n");
175         }
176       }
177 
178       // Add mode information if applicable
179       const char *mode_str = format_mode_names(desc->mode_bitmask);
180       if (mode_str && strcmp(mode_str, "all modes") != 0) {
181         if (strcmp(mode_str, "global") == 0) {
182           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "(mode: %s)\n", mode_str);
183         } else {
184           offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "(modes: %s)\n", mode_str);
185         }
186       }
187 
188       // Add REQUIRED note if applicable
189       if (desc->required) {
190         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "[REQUIRED]\n");
191       }
192     }
193   }
194 
195   SAFE_FREE(unique_groups);
196   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
197 
198   log_debug("Generated OPTIONS section (%zu bytes)", offset);
199   return buffer;
200 }






References option_descriptor_t::arg_placeholder,
    option_descriptor_t::default_value,
    options_config_t::descriptors, escape_groff_special(),
    format_mode_names(), option_descriptor_t::group,
    option_descriptor_t::help_text,
    option_descriptor_t::hide_from_binary_help,
    option_descriptor_t::hide_from_mode_help, log_debug,
    option_descriptor_t::long_name,
    option_descriptor_t::mode_bitmask,
    options_config_t::num_descriptors, OPTION_MODE_BINARY,
    OPTION_TYPE_ACTION, OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
    options_format_default_value(),
    options_get_type_placeholder(), option_descriptor_t::required,
    SAFE_FREE, SAFE_MALLOC, SAFE_REALLOC,
    safe_snprintf(), option_descriptor_t::short_name, and
    option_descriptor_t::type.


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().
